title: OmSaravanaBhava Browser-Local Personal Library
scope: Read-only aggregation of registered browser-local reading, notes, accessibility and listening data against the current published route directory.
limitations: The dashboard writes no new browser data.
Counts reflect only valid local records linked to the current route directory.
Ignored records may represent removed, renamed or invalid routes.
This is not a recommendation engine, user profile or analytics service.
No account, cloud synchronization or cross-device history is provided.
